## Workflow Checklist

- [ ] Orchestrator / BA: requirements and route are ready.
- [ ] SA: required design or SDD is approved, or N/A is recorded.
- [ ] Human: specification approval recorded when required by the selected route.
- [ ] Developer: implementation evidence and Draft Change Request are ready.
- [ ] QA: Acceptance Criteria results and QA evidence are recorded.
- [ ] Human: review and merge decision.
- [ ] Documentation Agent: post-merge closeout, when applicable.
